p161_completed_evidence.corrected_p_value_conclusion: After Bonferroni and Benjamini-Hochberg correction over a family of 40 tests, zero strategies beat the random baseline at alpha=0.05. The best raw p-value (midfreq_fourier_mk_3bet p_raw=0.0076) inflates to p_bonf=0.30376 and p_BH=0.0915 — both above 0.05. NULL result confirmed.
p161_completed_evidence.special_number_conclusion: Special number prediction (n=9000 rows, predicted_special NOT NULL) shows a hit_rate of 0.118111 vs random baseline of 0.125. Delta = -0.006889 (BELOW random). No strategy beats random on special number after correction.
p161_completed_evidence.multi_bet_slot_conclusion: Only one individual bet slot survives correction (midfreq_fourier_mk_3bet bet_index=1, p_bonf=0.010), but this is a full-history in-sample DESCRIPTIVE finding only. The 3-bet per-draw aggregate for the same strategy does NOT survive. No predictive claim is established; no walk-forward OOS was run.
p161_completed_evidence.leakage_safe_caveat: All per-strategy rankings are DESCRIPTIVE_IN_SAMPLE (full replay history used). Predictive claims require walk-forward OOS evaluation over >=500 distinct draws (L101). Classification: NOT_ESTABLISHED_NO_WALK_FORWARD.
p161_completed_evidence.null_no_edge_conclusion: POWER_LOTTO replay strategies are, in aggregate and individually after multiple-testing correction, statistically indistinguishable from a fair-random 6-of-38 process on main numbers, and at/below random on the special number. This is an EXPECTED, ACCEPTABLE NULL/at-random result. No strategy is shown to beat random out-of-sample. No win-guarantee claim and no real-money advice is made or implied.

cto_recommendation: P161 establishes POWER_LOTTO as at-random baseline. No edge detected after multiple comparison correction. Proceed to P163_RECONCILE_READINESS_AUDIT_ONLY. Do not promote champion, do not run controlled_apply, do not issue wagering recommendations.
next_task_scope_note: P163 is an audit/readiness-only task. It must not merge branches, write to DB, or mutate registry. It should assess whether the zen-gates worktree findings are reconcilable with the main branch baseline and identify any governance gaps.
main_zen_gates_baseline_split_risk: The zen-gates-ff6802 worktree and the main branch may have diverged since P158/P159B. Any reconciliation must treat both as read-only baselines until a governed merge plan is authorized. This split is flagged as a governance risk.
